documentation.text: @dev Provides tracking nonces for addresses. Nonces will only increment.
@dev The nonce used for an `account` is not the expected current nonce.

documentation.text: @dev Returns the next unused nonce for an address.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function () pure returns (struct NoncesUpgradeable.NoncesStorage storage pointer)

documentation.text:
@dev Consumes a nonce.
 Returns the current value and increments nonce.
@dev Same as {_useNonce} but checking that `nonce` is the next valid for `owner`.
